reviews.review_description: Turns classic works of art in 270 degree 3D animated environments. Very cool concept but being a "preview" there are only two to look at so far.
Very well done. Sensed real presence inside the first painting. Mona Lisa didn't work quite as well, but was still good.

Of course this is quite a limited demo, but the idea is great and the execution is even better. I would definitely like to be able to move around a little bit inside instead of just stand, but it's a great start and I would love to see dozens of paintings
The reproduction of these paintings is, in its own right, a work of art! This (very small) virtual art gallery is worth the visit of anyone with a Gear VR!
It's a pity there's only two paintings. But they're very well done. There is a lot of potential here. Keep up the good work.
Great work
Incredible experience cant wait for more amazing pieces of art!!

developer_response.body: Hello! Just wanted to let you know we have released a new app with 5 paintings! Have a nice day!

reviews.review_description: This should be a never ending app of additions. My only complaint was there is only 2 available right now but it was pretty amazing. It could also be pretty scary of the paintings suddenly changed into zombies or something.. Just saying

I have no idea how they get such great visual quality out of this platform. It's incredibly beautiful to look at... really impressive to see the surroundings the devs imagined and added to classic art in perfect harmony, they truly are artists themselves 
I love the idea and the execution... controls are as simple and intuitive as possible and it's close to perfect. It 'just' needs more content.
I enjoyed this preview.  Would love to see more.  Might be interesting to make more interactive, or provide a brief narrative description of the paintings and/or artists.
Really liked it wish there will be more painting soon

developer_response.body: Thank you for this review! Just wanted to let you know we have released a new app with 5 paintings! Have a nice day!

reviews.review_description: Wish there were more.

developer_response.body: Now there is! We have just released a new app with 5 paintings, have a nice day.

reviews.review_description: I think the effort that's gone into this is amazing and the visuals are fantastic. My only issue is that I want more! When will further content be released?

developer_response.body:
Hello again, this review is great! Would you allow us to quote it when presenting Art Plunge? (both on our webpage and elsewhere)
If yes, please drop us an email at artplunge@gmail.com and let us know! You can choose to be anonymous, or we can use your oculus username in case you don't want your real name to be published. (just say so in the email!)

reviews.review_title: Not into art but love it
reviews.review_description:
What an amazing experience, absolutely stunning the way it transports you into the paintings. 
This is definitely an app I would happily pay for, I've never heard of kickstarter and am apprehensive about putting crdit card details on a site I know nothing about. 
I would like to think this, once fully developed, will be an experience many would happily pay for.

Really hope to see more

Simple idea but really detailed. Feels like your really entering into the painting. Quite freaky warping into the mona Lisa painting and sitting   opposite her as she stares back slowly blinking  at you. The animation and clarity are fantastic.
Well done.
amazing good job
amazing

If you are a fan of classic art, this one is an amazing take on it. (I can't wait until there is more than 2 paintings to view though). I love the details and how the paintings look alive, which makes it feel like you're sharing the moment with the artist/or subject matter. Very cool.

developer_response.body: Thank you for this review Kristin! Just wanted to let you know we have released a new app with 5 paintings! Have a nice day!

reviews.review_description: Love please make more paintings available incredible experience
